title: DDB Integrator
description: Brings your D&D Beyond dice rolls into Foundry VTT as one unified, cinematic chat card — and gives rolls made inside Foundry the same polish. Attacks, damage, saves, checks and initiative each resolve on a single expanding card with optional full-screen cinematics, hit/miss and pass/fail call-outs, and group-roll gathers. Targeting-aware: attacks light up their targets and damage pre-selects the matching tray multipliers, with GM-only automation (confirm vs AC, save-based multipliers, auto-apply) that stays off by default. Bring your own sound effects — ships silent. Connects to the D&D Beyond game log on its own via a ddb-proxy (no MidiQOL or other modules required).
